description: Pitch coworking spaces, SaaS tools, and founder-adjacent services as event sponsors. Position sponsorship as brand access to 30-50 verified CM founders per event.
target_segment: Coworking spaces, productivity/business SaaS, remote work services, financial/legal services for expats, health/wellness for nomads — any brand whose customer is a CM-based founder or digital nomad

benefits: Social media tag in weekly recap post
Named event sponsor ("CM Founders, presented by [Brand]")
2-minute brand intro at each event (live or video)
Logo on all event clips and content
Booth/table at event for product demo
Featured in RSVP confirmation emails (sent to 300+ active members)
Verbal mention + logo at events you sponsor
Direct access to attendees during networking

steps.subject: Partnership opportunity — 40 verified CM founders every week
steps.body:
Hi {{first_name}},

I run CM Founders — a weekly event in Nimman that brings together 30-50 verified founders, digital nomads, and creators every Thursday.

Every attendee is vetted: they fill out an application with their business, website, and revenue stage. These are your actual customers.

We're looking for a community sponsor for Q2. In exchange for [PACKAGE_DETAILS], your brand gets:
- Live mention at each event
- Placement in our RSVP confirmation emails (300+ active members)
- Clips from events where your brand is featured

{{company_name}} felt like a natural fit given your focus on {{their_target_customer}}.

Would you be open to a quick call this week to see if it makes sense?

steps.subject: Re: Partnership opportunity — 40 verified CM founders every week
steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}} — following up on this.

We just had [LAST_WEEK_ATTENDEE_COUNT] people through the doors last Thursday. Founders working in ecom, SaaS, agencies, content — exactly the crowd that needs what {{company_name}} offers.

Happy to share our recent attendee breakdown if helpful. Or if sponsorship isn't the right angle, I'm open to other ideas.

Worth a quick chat?

steps.subject: Last note on CM Founders sponsorship
steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

Final follow-up. I know inbound pitches are noise — totally get it if it's not a fit.

If the timing or budget changes, feel free to reach back out. We run year-round and always have room for partners who want direct access to CM's founder community.

Either way, hope to see you at an event sometime.

Hey {{first_name}} — I run a weekly founders event in Chiang Mai (40+ vetted founders/Thursday). We're building out our sponsor roster for Q2.

{{company_name}} kept coming up when I asked our community what tools they use or want to learn more about.

Would a community sponsorship make sense for you? Happy to send over a one-pager if useful.

Hey {{first_name}} — just bumping this. The audience is genuinely strong: founders actively spending on tools, in a room together every week.

Let me know if you'd like the details.

steps.subject: Welcome aboard — CM Founders x {{company_name}}
steps.body:
{{first_name}},

Excited to have {{company_name}} on board as a [TIER_NAME] sponsor.

Here's what happens next:

1. **Payment:** [PAYMENT_LINK or invoice details]
2. **Assets needed from you:**
   - Logo (PNG, transparent bg preferred)
   - 1-2 sentence brand description
   - Website URL
   - Contact for event coordination

3. **First event coverage:** Your sponsorship goes live starting [START_DATE]

I'll confirm the setup before your first event and send a recap after with attendance numbers and any clips that featured your brand.

Reply with your assets whenever you're ready.
